info.name: Sports, Teams, Training & Fields API - Complete
info.description:
Complete API collection for Sports Management, Team Operations, Training Schedules, Field Management, Booking System, Attendance Tracking, and Member/Team Member Subscriptions

**Base URL**: {{baseUrl}}
**Authentication**: Bearer token in Authorization header
**Content-Type**: application/json

**Latest Addition**: Complete Booking System with available slots, calendar view, training conflict detection, and invitation link management

item.name: Teams Management
item.description: Team CRUD operations and team-related queries

request.description:
Create a new team

**Access**: SportActivityManager, SportActivitySpecialist
**Required Fields**:
- sport_id: UUID
- branch_id: UUID
- name: string
- max_members: number
- status: 'active' | 'inactive' | 'suspended' | 'archived'

Get all teams with optional filters

**Access**: All authenticated users
**Query Parameters** (optional):
- sport_id: Filter by sport UUID
- status: Filter by status (active, inactive, suspended, archived)
- branch_id: Filter by branch UUID

Get team details by ID

**Access**: All authenticated users
**Path Parameters**:
- id: Team UUID

Update team details

**Access**: SportActivityManager, SportActivitySpecialist
**Path Parameters**:
- id: Team UUID
**Optional Fields**:
- name
- max_members
- status

Update team status

**Access**: SportActivityManager
**Path Parameters**:
- id: Team UUID
**Body**:
- status: 'active' | 'inactive' | 'suspended' | 'archived'

Get all members in a team (both regular members and team members)

**Access**: SportActivityManager, SportActivitySpecialist
**Path Parameters**:
- id: Team UUID

Get available slots in a team

**Access**: All authenticated users
**Path Parameters**:
- id: Team UUID

Delete a team

**Access**: SportActivityManager
**Path Parameters**:
- id: Team UUID

item.name: Training Schedules
item.description: Create, retrieve, and manage team training schedules

request.description:
Create a new training schedule for a team

**Access**: SportActivityManager, SportActivitySpecialist
**Path Parameters**:
- teamId: Team UUID
**Required Fields**:
- day_of_week: 'MONDAY' | 'TUESDAY' | 'WEDNESDAY' | 'THURSDAY' | 'FRIDAY' | 'SATURDAY' | 'SUNDAY'
- start_time: HH:MM:SS format
- end_time: HH:MM:SS format
- location: string
- max_participants: number
- training_fee: number (decimal)

Get all training schedules for a team

**Access**: All authenticated users
**Path Parameters**:
- teamId: Team UUID

Get schedule details by ID

**Access**: All authenticated users
**Path Parameters**:
- scheduleId: Schedule UUID

Update a training schedule

**Access**: SportActivityManager, SportActivitySpecialist
**Path Parameters**:
- scheduleId: Schedule UUID
**Optional Fields**: Any field from schedule creation

Delete a training schedule

**Access**: SportActivityManager
**Path Parameters**:
- scheduleId: Schedule UUID

Get all training schedules for a specific sport

**Access**: All authenticated users
**Path Parameters**:
- sportId: Sport UUID

item.name: Get Schedules by Day of Week

request.description:
Get training schedules for a specific sport on a specific day of the week

**Access**: All authenticated users
**Path Parameters**:
- sportId: Sport UUID
- dayOfWeek: 'MONDAY' | 'TUESDAY' | 'WEDNESDAY' | 'THURSDAY' | 'FRIDAY' | 'SATURDAY' | 'SUNDAY'

Check availability for a training schedule

**Access**: All authenticated users
**Path Parameters**:
- scheduleId: Schedule UUID

item.name: Attendance Tracking
item.description: Record, track, and manage team member attendance

request.description:
Record attendance for a member in a training session

**Access**: SportActivityManager, SportActivitySpecialist
**Required Fields**:
- member_id: integer
- team_id: UUID
- training_schedule_id: UUID
- attendance_date: ISO 8601 date format (YYYY-MM-DD)
- attended: boolean
- notes: string (optional)

Update an attendance record

**Access**: SportActivityManager, SportActivitySpecialist
**Path Parameters**:
- id: Attendance record UUID
**Optional Fields**:
- attended: boolean
- notes: string

Get complete attendance history for a member

**Access**: SportActivityManager, SportActivitySpecialist, Member (own records)
**Path Parameters**:
- member_id: Member integer ID

Get absence records for a member in a specific team

**Access**: SportActivityManager, SportActivitySpecialist
**Path Parameters**:
- member_id: Member integer ID
- team_id: Team UUID

Send absence alert to admin when member exceeds absence threshold

**Access**: SportActivityManager, SportActivitySpecialist
**Path Parameters**:
- member_id: Member integer ID
**Body**:
- team_id: UUID
- threshold: number (absence count to trigger alert)
- message: string (alert message)

Get comprehensive attendance report for an entire team

**Access**: SportActivityManager, SportActivitySpecialist
**Path Parameters**:
- team_id: Team UUID

Get member's training schedule for the week

**Access**: All authenticated users (own schedule) or SportActivityManager (any member)
**Path Parameters**:
- member_id: Member integer ID

item.name: Member Subscriptions
item.description: Member sport subscription management - approval workflow

request.description:
Member can subscribe to a team

**Access**: Authenticated members (no special privilege required)
**Required Body**:
- team_id: Team UUID (string)
- member_id: Member ID (number)

**Validations**:
- Team must exist and be active
- Member must exist and be active
- No duplicate subscriptions allowed
- Team must have available capacity

**Returns**: 201 Created with pending subscription awaiting approval

Get all pending member sport subscription requests

**Privilege**: APPROVE_SPORT_SUBSCRIPTION
**Query Parameters** (optional):
- page: Page number (default: 1)
- limit: Items per page (default: 20)
- member_id: Filter by member ID

Get specific member subscription request details

**Privilege**: APPROVE_SPORT_SUBSCRIPTION
**Path Parameters**:
- subscriptionId: Member subscription ID

Approve a pending member sport subscription request

**Privilege**: APPROVE_SPORT_SUBSCRIPTION
**Path Parameters**:
- subscriptionId: Member subscription ID
**Optional Body**:
- notes: Additional approval notes

Decline a pending member sport subscription request

**Privilege**: APPROVE_SPORT_SUBSCRIPTION
**Path Parameters**:
- subscriptionId: Member subscription ID
**Body**:
- reason: Decline reason

Cancel an already approved member sport subscription

**Privilege**: APPROVE_SPORT_SUBSCRIPTION
**Path Parameters**:
- subscriptionId: Member subscription ID
**Optional Body**:
- reason: Cancellation reason

Get summary statistics for member sport subscriptions

**Privilege**: APPROVE_SPORT_SUBSCRIPTION
**Returns**: Count of pending, approved, declined, and cancelled subscriptions

item.name: Team Member Subscriptions
item.description: Team member subscription management with approval workflow

item.name: Team Member Self Subscribe to Team

request.description:
Team member can subscribe themselves to a team

**Access**: Authenticated team members (no staff privilege required)
**Required Body**:
- team_id: Team UUID (string)
- team_member_id: Team member ID (number)

**Validations**:
- Team must exist and be active
- Team member must exist and be active/approved
- No duplicate subscriptions allowed
- Team must have available capacity

**Returns**: 201 Created with pending subscription awaiting approval

Subscribe a team member to a team (creates pending status)

**Access**: Staff only
**Path Parameters**:
- teamMemberId: Team member integer ID
- teamId: Team UUID
**Optional Body**:
- start_date: ISO date format (YYYY-MM-DD)
- price: Subscription price (number)

Unsubscribe a team member from a team

**Access**: Staff only
**Path Parameters**:
- teamMemberId: Team member integer ID
- subscriptionId: Subscription integer ID

Approve a pending team member subscription

**Access**: Staff only
**Path Parameters**:
- subscriptionId: Subscription integer ID

Reject a pending team member subscription

**Access**: Staff only
**Path Parameters**:
- subscriptionId: Subscription integer ID

Get all teams a team member is subscribed to

**Access**: Public
**Path Parameters**:
- teamMemberId: Team member integer ID

Get all team members subscribed to a team with capacity info

**Access**: Public
**Path Parameters**:
- teamId: Team UUID
**Returns**: List of members with subscription status and capacity info

Check if team member is subscribed to a team

**Access**: Public
**Path Parameters**:
- teamMemberId: Team member integer ID
- teamId: Team UUID
**Returns**: Boolean is_subscribed value

Get all pending subscriptions for a team (staff review queue)

**Access**: Staff only
**Path Parameters**:
- teamId: Team UUID
**Returns**: List of pending subscription requests for staff approval

Get number of active teams a team member is subscribed to

**Access**: Public
**Path Parameters**:
- teamMemberId: Team member integer ID
**Returns**: Count of active team subscriptions

Create a new sport with teams and training schedules

**Access**: SportActivityManager, SportActivitySpecialist
**Required Fields**:
- name_en: string (English sport name)
- name_ar: string (Arabic sport name)
- teams: array (at least one team required)

**Optional Fields**:
- description_en: string
- description_ar: string
- sport_image: string

**Team Fields (Required)**:
- name_en: string (English team name)
- name_ar: string (Arabic team name)
- max_participants: number (must match field capacity)
- training: object (training schedule)
  - days_en: string (comma-separated, e.g., "Monday,Tuesday,Wednesday")
  - days_ar: string (comma-separated Arabic, e.g., "الاثنين, الثلاثاء, الاربعاء")
  - start_time: string (HH:MM:SS format)
  - end_time: string (HH:MM:SS format)
  - field_id: number (must be of this sport)
  - training_fee: number (non-negative)

**Note**: Sport, teams, and training schedules are created atomically

Get all sports with optional status filter

**Access**: All authenticated users
**Query Parameters** (optional):
- status: Filter by status (active, inactive)

Get sport details by ID

**Access**: All authenticated users
**Path Parameters**:
- id: Sport UUID

Update sport details

**Access**: SportActivityManager
**Path Parameters**:
- id: Sport UUID
**Optional Fields**: name, description, equipment_required, status

Delete a sport category

**Access**: SportActivityManager
**Path Parameters**:
- id: Sport UUID

item.name: Field Management
item.description: Field CRUD operations, operating hours, and availability checking

request.description:
Create a new field with optional operating hours

**Privilege**: CREATE_FIELD
**Required Fields**:
- name_en: English name
- name_ar: Arabic name
- sport_id: Sport ID (integer)

**Optional Fields**:
- description_en, description_ar: Descriptions
- capacity: Maximum capacity
- branch_id: Branch ID
- status: active, inactive, maintenance (default: active)
- hourly_rate: Rental rate
- operating_hours: Array of operating hours
  - day_of_week: 0 (Sunday) to 6 (Saturday)
  - opening_time: HH:MM:SS
  - closing_time: HH:MM:SS

Get all fields with optional filters

**Privilege**: VIEW_FIELDS
**Query Parameters** (optional):
- sport_id: Filter by sport ID
- branch_id: Filter by branch ID
- status: Filter by status (active, inactive, maintenance)

Get field details by ID

**Privilege**: VIEW_FIELDS
**Path Parameters**:
- fieldId: Field UUID

Get all active fields for a sport

**Privilege**: VIEW_FIELDS
**Path Parameters**:
- sportId: Sport ID (integer)

Get all fields for a branch

**Privilege**: VIEW_FIELDS
**Path Parameters**:
- branchId: Branch ID (integer)

Update field details

**Privilege**: UPDATE_FIELD
**Path Parameters**:
- fieldId: Field UUID
**Optional Fields**: All field properties

Update field status

**Privilege**: MANAGE_FIELD_STATUS
**Path Parameters**:
- fieldId: Field UUID
**Body**:
- status: active, inactive, or maintenance

Delete a field

**Privilege**: DELETE_FIELD
**Path Parameters**:
- fieldId: Field UUID

Add operating hours to a field

**Privilege**: MANAGE_FIELD_HOURS
**Path Parameters**:
- fieldId: Field UUID
**Body**:
- hours: Array of operating hours
  - day_of_week: 0 (Sunday) to 6 (Saturday)
  - opening_time: HH:MM:SS
  - closing_time: HH:MM:SS

Replace all operating hours for a field

**Privilege**: MANAGE_FIELD_HOURS
**Path Parameters**:
- fieldId: Field UUID
**Body**: Same as Add Operating Hours

Get operating hours for a field

**Privilege**: VIEW_FIELDS
**Path Parameters**:
- fieldId: Field UUID

Delete operating hours for a specific day

**Privilege**: MANAGE_FIELD_HOURS
**Path Parameters**:
- fieldId: Field UUID
- day: Day of week (0-6, where 0 is Sunday)

Check if field is available at specific time

**Privilege**: VIEW_FIELDS
**Path Parameters**:
- fieldId: Field UUID
**Body**:
- day_of_week: 0 (Sunday) to 6 (Saturday)
- time: HH:MM:SS format

Update field booking availability settings

**Privilege**: MANAGE_FIELD_HOURS
**Path Parameters**:
- fieldId: Field UUID
**Body**:
- is_available_for_booking: Enable/disable booking
- booking_slot_duration: Slot duration in minutes (15-480)

Get all bookable fields (active and available for booking)

**Privilege**: VIEW_FIELDS
**Query Parameters**:
- sport_id (optional): Filter by sport

Get bookable fields grouped by sport

**Privilege**: VIEW_FIELDS

Create a new booking for a field

**Auth**: Required
**Body**:
- userType: "member" or "team_member"
- userId: Member or Team Member ID (integer)
- sport_id: Sport ID
- field_id: Field UUID
- start_time: ISO datetime
- end_time: ISO datetime
- expected_participants: Number of expected participants
- notes: Optional notes
- language: "ar" or "en"

Get detailed booking information

**Auth**: Required

Get all bookings for a specific user

**Auth**: Required
**Path Parameters**:
- userType: "member" or "team_member"
- userId: User ID

Get booking statistics for a user

**Auth**: Required
**Path Parameters**:
- userType: "member" or "team_member"
- userId: User ID

Confirm payment for a booking

**Auth**: Required
**Body**:
- paymentReference: Payment reference from gateway

Cancel a booking

**Auth**: Required
**Body**:
- reason (optional): Cancellation reason

Get available booking slots for a specific date

**Auth**: Required
**Query Parameters**:
- date: YYYY-MM-DD format

Get calendar view with available and booked slots

**Auth**: Required
**Query Parameters**:
- start_date: YYYY-MM-DD
- end_date: YYYY-MM-DD (max 31 days range)

Get all bookings across all fields (admin view)

**Auth**: Required (Admin/Staff)
**Privilege**: VIEW_ALL_BOOKINGS
**Query Parameters** (all optional):
- field_id: Filter by field
- status: Filter by status
- start_date: Filter from date
- end_date: Filter to date

Mark a booking as completed

**Auth**: Required (Admin/Staff)
**Privilege**: MANAGE_FIELD_BOOKINGS

Get operating hours for a field (public endpoint)

**Auth**: Not required

Get booking details via invitation link (public endpoint)

**Auth**: Not required
**Path Parameters**:
- shareToken: 64-character booking share token

**Returns**:
- booking_id: UUID
- sport_name_ar, sport_name_en: Sport names
- field_name_ar, field_name_en: Field names
- field_location_ar, field_location_en: Field locations
- start_time, end_time: ISO datetime
- expected_participants: Number
- registered_participants: Current count
- available_spots: Remaining capacity
- status: Booking status
- booker_name, booker_phone: Organizer info

**Use Case**: Display booking invitation page with all details

formdata.description: Optional - Front photo of national ID (JPEG/PNG/PDF, max 5MB)
Optional - Back photo of national ID (JPEG/PNG/PDF, max 5MB)

request.description:
Register as participant via invitation link with national ID photos (public endpoint)

**Auth**: Not required
**Content-Type**: multipart/form-data
**Path Parameters**:
- shareToken: 64-character booking share token

**Form Fields**:
- full_name: string (required)
- phone_number: string (optional)
- national_id: string (optional)
- email: string (optional)
- national_id_front: file (optional, JPEG/PNG/PDF, max 5MB)
- national_id_back: file (optional, JPEG/PNG/PDF, max 5MB)

**Validations**:
- At least one contact method required (phone/email/national_id)
- Cannot register if booking is cancelled or completed
- Cannot register if maximum participants reached
- Duplicate check on national_id per booking
- Files uploaded to Cloudinary (helwan-club/participant-ids/)

**Returns**:
- participant_id: UUID
- full_name, phone_number, national_id, email
- has_national_id_photos: boolean
- registered_at: timestamp
- message: Success message

**Use Case**: Public registration form for booking participants

Get all participants for a booking with national ID photos (admin endpoint)

**Auth**: Required (Admin/Staff)
**Privilege**: VIEW_BOOKING_PARTICIPANTS (recommended)
**Path Parameters**:
- bookingId: Booking UUID

**Returns**:
- booking: Complete booking details
  - id, sport, field, start_time, end_time
  - status, price, expected_participants
  - share_token, created_at
- booker: Organizer information
  - type: "member" or "team_member"
  - id, name, phone, email
- participants: Array of all participants
  - participant_id: UUID
  - full_name, phone_number, national_id, email
  - national_id_front: Cloudinary URL (if uploaded)
  - national_id_back: Cloudinary URL (if uploaded)
  - is_creator: boolean (true for booker)
  - registered_at: timestamp
- statistics:
  - total_participants: count
  - expected_participants: count
  - available_spots: remaining capacity
  - with_national_id: count with ID photos

**Use Case**: 
- Admin dashboard to view booking details
- Verify participant identities
- Download/view national ID photos
- Check attendance list

item.name: Member Booking API
item.description: Simplified member-focused booking endpoints for field reservations

request.description:
Browse all sports with bookable fields

**Auth**: Not required
**Returns**: Sports with their bookable fields

Get all bookable fields for a specific sport

**Auth**: Not required
**Path Parameters**:
- sportId: Sport ID (integer)

query.description: End date (YYYY-MM-DD) - defaults to today + 7 days

request.description:
View calendar with available/booked/training slots

**Auth**: Not required
**Path Parameters**:
- fieldId: Field UUID
**Query Parameters** (optional):
- start_date: Start date (defaults to today)
- end_date: End date (defaults to today + 7 days)

Get available time slots for a specific date

**Auth**: Not required
**Path Parameters**:
- fieldId: Field UUID
**Query Parameters** (optional):
- date: Date (defaults to today)

Create a new booking (simplified member endpoint)

**Auth**: Required
**Body**:
- memberId: Member ID (integer) - Required
- sport_id: Sport ID - Required
- field_id: Field UUID - Required
- start_time: ISO datetime - Required (must be in future)
- end_time: ISO datetime - Required
- expected_participants: Number (default: 1)
- notes: Optional notes

**Validations**:
- Cannot book in the past
- Checks booking conflicts
- Checks training schedule conflicts

Confirm payment for a booking

**Auth**: Required
**Path Parameters**:
- bookingId: Booking UUID
**Body**:
- paymentReference: Payment reference from gateway

query.description: Filter by status: pending_payment, confirmed, completed, cancelled

request.description:
Get all bookings for a member

**Auth**: Required
**Path Parameters**:
- memberId: Member ID (integer)
**Query Parameters** (optional):
- status: Filter by booking status

Get upcoming bookings (future confirmed or pending)

**Auth**: Required
**Path Parameters**:
- memberId: Member ID (integer)

Get past bookings (completed or cancelled)

**Auth**: Required
**Path Parameters**:
- memberId: Member ID (integer)

Get booking statistics for a member

**Auth**: Required
**Path Parameters**:
- memberId: Member ID (integer)
**Returns**: Total bookings, confirmed, participants, revenue

Cancel a booking

**Auth**: Required
**Path Parameters**:
- bookingId: Booking UUID
**Body** (optional):
- reason: Cancellation reason

item.name: Team Subscription Payment Flow
item.description: Complete team subscription payment flow with automatic validation, payment processing, and optional admin approval

request.description:
Validate subscription rules before payment

**Auth**: Required
**Body**:
- userId: Member or Team Member ID (integer)
- userType: "member" or "team_member"
- teamId: Team UUID

**Validations**:
- Team exists and is active
- Team has available capacity
- User not already subscribed to this team
- User not subscribed to another team in same sport
- No training schedule conflicts

**Returns**: Validation result with errors if any

Create subscription and payment record

**Auth**: Required
**Body**:
- userId: Member or Team Member ID (integer)
- userType: "member" or "team_member"
- teamId: Team UUID

**Process**:
1. Validates all subscription rules automatically
2. Creates payment record in payments table
3. Creates subscription with status 'pending_payment'
4. Links subscription to payment via payment_id

**Returns**:
- subscription: Subscription details
- payment: Payment reference, amount, currency, status
- team: Team details
- paymentRequired: true
- approvalRequiredAfterPayment: boolean

**Next Step**: Redirect user to payment gateway with payment_reference

Confirm payment and activate subscription

**Auth**: Required (typically called by payment gateway webhook)
**Path Parameters**:
- subscriptionId: Subscription ID (integer)
**Body**:
- userType: "member" or "team_member"
- paymentReference: Payment reference from subscription creation
- transactionId: Gateway transaction ID
- gatewayResponse: Full gateway response (optional, for debugging)

**Process**:
1. Updates payment status in payments table to 'completed'
2. Sets payment_completed_at timestamp
3. If team.approval_required = false:
   - Activates subscription immediately (status = 'active')
4. If team.approval_required = true:
   - Sets subscription status to 'pending_admin_approval'

**Returns**:
- subscription: Updated subscription details
- payment: Payment details
- requiresAdminApproval: boolean
- message: Status message

Get all subscriptions pending admin approval

**Auth**: Required (Admin/Staff)
**Privilege**: APPROVE_SPORT_SUBSCRIPTION
**Query Parameters** (optional):
- userType: Filter by "member" or "team_member"

**Returns**: Array of pending subscriptions with:
- Subscription details
- Member/Team member info
- Team details
- Payment information
- Timestamps

Approve pending subscription

**Auth**: Required (Admin/Staff)
**Privilege**: APPROVE_SPORT_SUBSCRIPTION
**Path Parameters**:
- subscriptionId: Subscription ID (integer)
**Body**:
- userType: "member" or "team_member"
- staffId: Staff member ID who approved

**Process**:
1. Updates subscription status to 'active'
2. Sets admin_approved_at timestamp
3. Records approved_by_staff_id

**Returns**:
- subscription: Activated subscription details
- message: Success message

item.name: Payment Management
item.description: Central payment tracking and management for all transaction types

request.description:
Get payment details by payment reference

**Auth**: Required
**Path Parameters**:
- paymentReference: Payment reference (PAY_YYYYMMDD_HHMMSS_RANDOM)

**Returns**: Complete payment record with:
- id, payment_reference, transaction_id
- payment_type, amount, currency, status
- entity details (who paid)
- related entity (what they paid for)
- gateway details
- timestamps
- staff tracking (if manual payment)

query.description: Filter by status: pending, completed, failed, refunded, cancelled (optional)

request.description:
Get payment history for a user

**Auth**: Required
**Path Parameters**:
- entityType: "member" or "team_member"
- entityId: User ID (integer)
**Query Parameters** (optional):
- status: Filter by payment status

**Returns**: Array of all payments by this user

**Payment Types**:
- team_subscription
- field_booking
- package_purchase
- membership_fee
- training_session
- tournament_registration
- equipment_rental
- late_fee
- refund

Get all payments for a team (revenue tracking)

**Auth**: Required (Admin/Staff)
**Privilege**: VIEW_PAYMENT_REPORTS
**Path Parameters**:
- teamId: Team UUID
**Query Parameters** (optional):
- status: Filter by payment status

**Returns**: Array of all team subscription payments

**Use for**:
- Team revenue reports
- Subscription tracking
- Financial analytics

Process manual/cash payment

**Auth**: Required (Admin/Staff)
**Privilege**: PROCESS_MANUAL_PAYMENTS
**Body**:
- paymentReference: Payment reference from subscription
- staffId: Staff member processing payment
- paymentMethod: "cash", "bank_transfer", "wallet"

**Process**:
1. Updates payment status to 'completed'
2. Sets completed_at timestamp
3. Records processed_by_staff_id
4. Sets gateway_name to 'manual'

**Use for**:
- Cash payments at facility
- Bank transfer confirmations
- Manual payment processing

Process payment refund

**Auth**: Required (Admin/Staff)
**Privilege**: PROCESS_REFUNDS
**Body**:
- paymentReference: Payment reference to refund
- staffId: Staff member processing refund
- reason: Refund reason (optional)

**Process**:
1. Validates payment status is 'completed'
2. Updates status to 'refunded'
3. Sets refunded_at timestamp
4. Records refunded_by_staff_id
5. Saves reason in notes

**Returns**: Updated payment record

**Note**: Does not automatically cancel subscription - handle separately

Get payments by type

**Auth**: Required (Admin/Staff)
**Privilege**: VIEW_PAYMENT_REPORTS
**Path Parameters**:
- paymentType: Payment type

**Payment Types**:
- team_subscription
- field_booking
- package_purchase
- membership_fee
- training_session
- tournament_registration
- equipment_rental
- late_fee
- refund

**Query Parameters** (optional):
- status: Filter by status
- limit: Max results (default: 100)

**Returns**: Array of payments of specified type
